title: neotessmannia uniflora
intro: Neotessmannia uniflora, also known as the Tessmann's flower or mountain guava, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. Neotessmannia uniflora is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Neotessmannia uniflora include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Neotessmannia uniflora can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
